chat_history.content: Tell me about yourself and what kind of relationship you want.

I'm a woman, 29, based in San Francisco, and I work in product design. I am thoughtful, curious, and a little introverted. I love hiking, reading, cooking, and music. I'm looking for a serious long-term relationship with a man between 28 and 36. Kindness, honesty, humor, and emotional maturity matter a lot to me. I don't want someone who smokes.
